nodes.name: Vapi Webhook (DEACTIVATED)
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. POST /webhook/vapi/transcript-stream. Vapi emits one event per transcript chunk (~1s cadence). We validate HMAC, run consent gates, queue async classification, and return 200 fast (<200ms target) so Vapi doesn't back off.

nodes.name: Verify HMAC
nodes.notes: TODO: set VAPI_WEBHOOK_SECRET in n8n env. Until set, node runs in placeholder mode and accepts all requests — do NOT activate this workflow without the secret.

nodes.name: Process Chunk (RPC)
nodes.notes: RPC short-circuits to NULL if the client lacks listening_intelligence_enabled OR the agent lacks call_recording_consent. Either way this node returns 200 — the transcript is simply discarded.

nodes.name: Trigger Classifier (async)
nodes.notes: Fire-and-forget call to the real-time classifier. 500ms timeout keeps the Vapi round-trip under the <200ms budget goal even when the classifier is slow or down. Swap the URL to the n8n production origin at activation.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, accepted: $('Parse RPC').first().json.accepted, chunk_id: $('Parse RPC').first().json.chunk_id || null }) }}
